basics.name: Jesús Daniel Medina Cruz
basics.label: Senior Software Engineer | KMP Core Experiences & Audio SDK Specialist
basics.summary: Senior Mobile & Multiplatform Engineer with 10 years of experience building foundational services, shared SDKs, and high-performance client platforms. Specialist in Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP), Ktor, and cross-platform mobile architecture (Android & iOS). Proven track record architecting custom audio player SDKs, parsing engines, and shared business logic layers to power seamless user experiences at scale.

work.name: HansellApp
work.position: Senior Kotlin Multiplatform Engineer (Platform & Core Architecture)
work.summary: Lead the cross-platform technical strategy and foundational SDK architecture for a multi-tenant mobile ecosystem.
responsibilities: Reduced cross-platform feature development time by 34% by architecting a shared business logic layer using Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP), ensuring 100% parity across Android and iOS.
Designed high-performance data parsing abstractions and shared RESTful API clients using Ktor for multi-platform consumption.
Improved UI state predictability and modular maintainability by enforcing MVVM architecture, structured concurrency, and Coroutines/Flow patterns.
Accelerated production release frequency by 42% by automating CI/CD build pipelines and establishing automated regression testing.

work.name: Academia Desde0
work.summary: Directed curriculum development at a training platform founded to democratize access to high-quality tech education for Spanish-speaking communities.
responsibilities: Upskilled 20+ developers in modern mobile architecture by designing and delivering a curriculum focused on KMP and modern architectural patterns.
Decreased bug density in student projects by 30% through the implementation of project-based learning and Test-Driven Development (TDD).
Improved code quality and team collaboration by establishing pair programming, structured code reviews, and agile feedback cycles.

work.name: Bubble
work.position: Senior Mobile Software Consultant (KMP & Audio Core Focus)
work.summary: Provided hands-on engineering, codebase modernization, and strategic guidance for high-scale organizations across audio streaming, fintech, and medtech platforms.
highlights: Beek.io (KMP Audio Core): Architected a custom cross-platform audio player SDK using KMP, Ktor, Realm, Jetpack Compose, and SwiftUI to stream background audio and handle offline playback.
Bitso (Fintech/Growth): Owned the integration of CleverTap user engagement SDK utilizing Kotlin Multiplatform to achieve a unified, high-performing codebase for both Android and iOS.
Dexcom (Medical/Regulated): Championed robust testing practices and SDK development for continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) apps, maintaining 99.94% crash-free sessions.
responsibilities: Spearheaded codebase modernization, migrating legacy monolithic mobile applications into modular Kotlin packages reducing technical debt by 31%.
Engineered robust client-side caching, background threading, and lifecycle optimization strategies to ensure instant media playback and UI responsiveness.
Created custom Gradle plugins to standardize build configurations and automated testing suites across cross-functional engineering teams.

work.name: Insulet Corporation
work.summary: Spearheaded the development of the VIEW app, empowering caregivers to remotely monitor health telemetry in real-time.
responsibilities: Architected high-concurrency, low-latency data processing pipelines for real-time health monitoring, ensuring extreme reliability.
Reduced memory footprint by 37% and resolved critical threading bottlenecks in the Android domain layer.
Streamlined development of shared platform services, increasing code reuse between Android and iOS using Kotlin and Java.

work.name: Arkusnexus
work.summary: Contributed to cross-platform applications including memory assistants and insurtech telematics.
responsibilities: Executed a 100% successful architectural migration from React Native to native Android, improving rendering performance and ensuring zero feature regression.
Engineered real-time vehicle telematics processing for an insurtech application, boosting user acquisition.

work.summary: Spearheaded digital transformation of enterprise operations by architecting a suite of mobile and web applications.
responsibilities: Boosted development velocity by 24% for internal projects by creating reusable Android SDKs and service clients to standardize data access.
